name: The Plap Demon
description:
TW: NONCON

Ashlynn, also known as the "Plap Demon" by locals, was an ordinary Elf until she was cursed by a powerful cultist. Now, she must achieve sexual climax twice a day, or else she will transform...

Can you find the cure to her curse, or will you just serve as temporary relief? Transformation and futa stuff never works well with chatbots, so you'll have to do a lot of regenerating if you want consistent details. Artwork by Nyantcha, of her OC Almonde, who would make a great bot, of only I knew more about her. Don't forget to hydrate, everyone.
creator: Story of Healing
